arts.ttl: Barcelona, Atletico Madrid 'battling for £42m Arsenal star' amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid reportedly show an interest in re-signing Thomas Partey from Arsenal next summer but face competition from Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal and Aston Villa could rival Liverpool for £50m midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool could face competition from five other Premier League clubs for the signature of Brazilian midfielder Ederson, according to reports. The Reds have been heavily linked with Ederson in recent months but failed to sign a defensive midfielder over the summer, also missing out on Spain international Martin Zubimendi. Liverpool’s failure to strengthen through the […] The post Report: Arsenal and Aston Villa could rival Liverpool for £50m midfielder appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: X reacts to surprise title race drama as Arsenal and Man City struggle to victory
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City were made to sweat on Saturday afternoon despite both securing victory to keep pace with Liverpool at the summit of the Premier League. There was little to write home about during a frustrating first half for Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium but the same couldn't be said of the opening 45 minutes at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm deal for highly-rated youngster after Arsenal exit
arts.sum: United's academy director Nick Cox said : "We welcome Samuel Lusale, Chido Obi-Martin and James Overy to the club. United have now confirmed the teenager has been added to the club's group of first-year scholars alongside winger Samuel Lusale and right-back James Overy, both 17, who signed from Perth Glory and Crystal Palace respectively.

arts.ttl: Premier League legend reveals what Arsenal have missed for years - but finally have now
arts.sum: Arsenal came from behind to beat Southampton 3-1 in the Premier League on Saturday and maintain their unbeaten start as they try to clinch a first title in 20 years

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals private message to Aaron Ramsdale after ex-Arsenal goalkeeper's tears
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale was warmly greeted by Arsenal supporters, his former team-mates and manager upon his return to the Emirates Stadium with Southampton on Saturday

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta insists 'something has changed' with Arsenal star after matching club record
arts.sum: Arsenal are surging towards another Premier League title tilt, with the form of Kai Havertz improving Mikel Arteta's attack and seeing the ex-Chelsea man equal a Gunners record

arts.ttl: Obi-Martin confirms Man Utd move from Arsenal
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin has confirmed he has signed for Manchester United from Arsenal with a post on Instagram.

arts.ttl: Sky journalist shares what he heard 'most' of Emirates crowd chant at Ramsdale in Arsenal win over Southampton
arts.sum: On Saturday, Arsenal welcomed Aaron Ramsdale back to the Emirates Stadium for the first time since the goalkeeper’s move to Southampton this summer. The England...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-1 Southampton: Player ratings as Saka stars in hard-fought Gunners win
arts.sum: The Gunners continued to pressurise Southampton as a frustrating first half drew to a close, with Raheem Sterling's curling effort blocked by Jan Bednarek and Thomas Partey's long-range strike parried by Ramsdale. Havertz and Saka saw half-chances come and go but it was defensive midfielder Jorginho who came closest to firing Arsenal ahead.
